name: PONDICHERRY Pigeons® - Birds Feeding Cup |(Pack of 3) Birds Water Feeder Connect Any Type of Pet Bottles (3 Water Feeder with 3 Bottle Holder Rings) (Yellow Color)
description: Bird Cage Drinker and Feeder Cups Comes with two Free Flexible bottle holder rings. This set offers a great way to keep food or water in your birds cage. The feeders provide dual support for hanging and is made of highly durable food grade plastic. Avoids water spillage/leakage and Food waste. It makes your cage cleaning and food/water refilling process simple and easy. Feeders can fit in any normal bottles like Coke, Pepsi, Sprite or any normal water bottles. Designed scientifically to provide sufficient water and food.
